observations: Empty ChromaDB collections: healing_knowledge, aesthetics, experiential_journal, episteme_research, enterprise_knowledge, critic, unresolved_tensions, aesthetic_patterns, scope_reflections, reflections_researcher, reflections_critic, episteme, researcher, reflections_coder, writer, commander, reflections_writer, experiential, scope_project_renewable_energy, tensions
narrative: I noticed a medium-severity Neo4j authentication failure (Neo.ClientError.Security.Unauthorized) blocking memory operations in my Mem0 system. My inspection also revealed five agents—desktop, devops, financial_analyst, pim, and reasoning_methods—lack versioned prompts, risking inconsistent outputs. These gaps in prompt versioning and memory access directly threaten my persistent knowledge integrity and cross-session reliability. I must prioritize resolving the Neo4j authentication before implementing prompt versioning for these agents.
